name: spinwheel
author: Taako
description: A polished animated wheel spinner for Red-DiscordBot with secure random selection, saved wheels, color themes, custom palettes, winner removal, slash commands, and a standalone dashboard.
install_msg: spinwheel loaded. Use `[p]wheel spin <entry, entry, ...>` for an instant wheel, `[p]wheel create` to save one, `/wheel spin` for the slash command, or Red-Web-Dashboard for visual setup.
short: Animated, colorful, cryptographically random wheels with saved presets and dashboard controls.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores server-created wheel names, user-provided entry labels, color settings, winner-removal preferences, and aggregate spin counts. It does not store Discord user IDs.
